summary: Programme/Course Management feature testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified: Courses page with stats cards, search/filter, Add/Edit modals with validation, Deactivate confirmation dialog, and Reactivation flow. Deactivation correctly blocked for programmes with active enrolments (409 error).
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/programmes - List all programmes with enrollment counts
POST /api/admin/programmes - Create new programme with all currencies (INR, GBP, USD, EUR)
POST /api/admin/programmes - Validation: name too short (< 2 chars) rejected
POST /api/admin/programmes - Validation: price 0 or negative rejected
PATCH /api/admin/programmes/:id - Duplicate name on update rejected
DELETE /api/admin/programmes/:id - Fails with 409 for programme with active enrolments
UI: Courses page shows in Admin sidebar with BookOpen icon
UI: Stats cards display Total Programmes, Active, Enrolments, Revenue
UI: Search input filters programmes by name
UI: Add Programme modal opens with form validation
UI: Edit Programme modal pre-fills existing data
UI: Deactivate confirmation dialog shows programme name
UI: Deactivation blocked with error toast for programme with enrolments
critical_code_review_comments: All programme CRUD operations implemented correctly with proper validation
Soft delete pattern used - programmes are deactivated not hard deleted
Duplicate name check is case-insensitive using PostgreSQL iLike
Enrolment count properly fetched and displayed for each programme
Audit logging implemented for all programme actions
data-testid attributes added to all key interactive elements

active_programmes: Level 7 Diploma in Dental Implantology (GBP £7,999) - 2 enrolments
seed_data_present.inactive_test_programmes: 13 TEST_ prefixed programmes created during testing (inactive)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Programme Management feature fully tested. All /api/admin/programmes/* endpoints functional. Frontend CoursesPage shows correct stats, search/filter, CRUD modals work. DELETE is soft-delete (deactivate). Level 7 programme has 2 enrolments and cannot be deactivated (409 error). TEST_ programmes remain in database as inactive records.

mocked_integrations.stripe: MOCKED - Stripe payments in mock mode
mocked_integrations.gohighlevel: MOCKED - GoHighLevel notifications in mock mode
